CRANK_DEP_003 — unclassified third-party app called from `:domain`.

The domain calls a third-party OTP app that is not in the project's
:third_party_pure or :third_party_impure list. Boundary fires; the
`:crank` compiler emits this code so users explicitly classify each
new dep before it can be called from domain code.

Exercised by:
- test/crank/boundary_integration_test.exs — translate_error with
  invalid_external_dep_call and an unclassified target_app.
- test/integration/topology_test.exs.

Fix: add the app's atom name to either :third_party_pure or
:third_party_impure in the project's :boundary config.
